race.comment: SWEET FARNAN (9) transferred from Moody/Coleman to Craig Widdison before her last run, a game second over this trip at Wagga where she led for home. Was five weeks between runs that day so she should strip fitter. Great chance to go one better. SNEAKY PEE CEE (1) led on straightening when fresh from a long spell last start over 1100m at Goulburn but found the winner far too good in the final stages. Will benefit greatly from that hit-out and coming back to 1000m looks a good move. Major player. REDS EXPRESS (8) returned from nearly a year off the scene with an encouraging effort at the Sapphire Coast last time. Open to plenty of improvement. TARA'S CROWN (5) showed ability on debut when in the minors before missing the placings over 1200m at Yarra Valley when ninth last time. Could improve here.
